ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team in the rankings */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was last updated */,
  "previous_position" INTEGER /* Previous position of the team */,
  "tournaments_won" INTEGER /* Number of tournaments won by the team */,
  "highest_position" INTEGER /* Highest position ever achieved by the team */,
  "lowest_position" INTEGER /* Lowest position ever achieved by the team */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team in the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., Test, ODI, T20) */,
  "man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Player of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Indicator if the team is playing at home */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* Indicator if the team is playing away */,
  "result_margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (e.g., runs, wickets) */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made after winning the toss (bat or field) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan) */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player in the roster */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  "international_debut_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's international debut */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "total_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "total_wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
